summary: Plan-only classification: #37966 remains the open canonical issue. #92665 is the active related fix PR for the same root cause and should remain open for maintainer review; no merge is planned because merge is blocked by job frontmatter and no merge preflight was requested. #38221 is already closed and kept only as historical source-pr evidence.

actions.reason: #37966 is the clearest surviving canonical issue for the root cause and remains open for validation and follow-up.
#92665 is a plausible active candidate fix for the canonical issue, but this plan-mode job only classifies it and leaves it open.
Already-closed refs must not receive closure actions; #38221 is retained only as historical contributor-credit evidence for the current fix path.
